$comment: Selector registry for grocery-list. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. Anchors target the seeded 'Weekly shop' list (src/qa/fixtures.ts). text = Maestro regex (matches visible text OR a11y label).

weekly-list.note: the seeded QA list. Wrapped with .* because the list card merges title+subtitle into one a11y label ('Weekly shop, 2 of 12 checked') on iOS; Maestro full-matches the regex, so bare 'Weekly shop' never matched a screen where the card is plainly visible.

first-item.note: first seeded item, confirms the list opened

add-input.note: the add-item TextInput (placeholder + a11y label 'Add an item'). Tap it to FOCUS before typing — the 'Add item' Plus button is disabled while the field is empty, so tapping the button first is a no-op and the typed text lands nowhere (the original CI red: nothing got added, final assert failed on both platforms). Distinct from 'Add item' under Maestro's full-match regex.

added-item.note: an item NOT in the seed; typed + submitted by the core add action. Its row uses accessibilityLabel={it.name} (ListDetailScreen), and 'avocado' is a real keyword in src/data/categories.ts, so the anchor is grounded. assertNot before / assert after = the add actually landed.
